Week 3 | Midterm Exam
Midterm Exam
Instructions
Due by the end of class.

This 50-question Midterm Exam covers the following from Introduction to Writing:

Chapter 2 Section 1
Chapter 4 Section 4
Chapter 5 Section 4
Chapter 9 Sections 1, 2, & 3
Chapter 12 Section 4
Chapter 13 Sections 1, 3, 4, & 5
Select the "Take the Quiz" button to complete this 50-question exam. 

Please do not attempt the midterm exam before completing the weekly readings, lectures, and assignments. You will have ONE attempt for the midterm exam. The exam is timed, you have 2 minutes allotted for each question.

Time for Completion
You have 100 minutes to complete the midterm exam.

Click Next to read the Week 3 Summary.

Week 3 | Summary
Summary
This week, we reached a pivotal part of our writing journey. After learning about prewriting, brainstorming, and initial drafting phases, it was time to refine and elevate our papers through strategic revision. We focused on distinguishing between revision and editing, highlighting that editing addresses surface-level corrections like grammar, spelling, and punctuation. In contrast, revision encompasses a broader view of the writing, ensuring alignment with the intended purpose and effective audience engagement.
